---
layout: cv
title: Nathan Ricks' CV
---
# Nathan Ricks


## Currently

Student at BYU-I


### Specialized in

Majoring in Statistics
Probability


### Research interests

Statistics, Probability, Finance


## Education
 - Exam P SOA May 26
 - Bachelor's in Statistics - Apr 27
 

## Occupation


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: July 2026 -->
